$comment: SSoT for cross-layer fallback DEFAULTS (SSOT-X1). These are the values each layer falls back to when a profile omits a field; the profile YAML under profiles/ remains the per-run source of truth. Edit values HERE, then run `go generate ./...` from network/ to regenerate the per-layer constant files (network/internal/types/defaults_gen.go, lib/defaults.generated.sh, mcp-server/src/utils/defaults.generated.ts). Do NOT hand-edit the generated files. The chain binary name (gstable) is intentionally excluded — it is adapter-scoped and tracked by M4 (docs/HARDCODING_AUDIT.md).
